no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/bead ./internal/checks && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestSubmitWithPreMergeChecks'

No new code changes were made in this attempt because the implementation for bead ddx-3e60fd84 is already present in this worktree history at commit 43efd67eb74320cfb45e93ae96b526d1d97812f3 (`feat(agent): pre-merge checks gate with checks_bypass annotation [ddx-3e60fd84]`), which is an ancestor of the current checkpoint.

Evidence inspected:
- cli/internal/agent/checks_premerge.go implements RunPreMergeChecks, AppendPreMergeChecksEvents, and PreserveAfterPreMergeChecks.
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go defines SubmitWithPreMergeChecks, which runs pre_merge checks before submit, preserves refs/ddx/iterations/<bead-id>/ on block/error, and records checks-blocked/checks-bypass events.
- cli/cmd/try.go and cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go route ddx try / execute-loop landing through SubmitWithPreMergeChecks.
- cli/internal/server/workers.go routes server-managed execute-loop landing through evaluateGatesAndSubmit; this committed slice includes the single-bead and CLI loop integration paths, while server gate integration remains governed by its existing required-gate helper.
- cli/internal/bead/checks_bypass.go parses checks_bypass annotations and rejects empty reasons.
- cli/internal/agent/checks_premerge_e2e_test.go covers dummy-fail abort/preserve/evidence/event, dummy-fail bypass merge/event, and missing-reason rejection.
- cli/internal/bead/checks_bypass_test.go covers parser success and validation failures.

Verification performed in this attempt:
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/bead ./internal/checks && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestSubmitWithPreMergeChecks'` passed.
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent ./internal/bead ./internal/checks ./cmd` failed only in github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/cmd: TestReviewEvidenceApproveAttributesToTier still reports zero review events, and installation acceptance tests expect cli/build/ddx to exist.
- `cd cli && go test ./...` reproduced the same cmd failures; all touched internal packages passed.
- `lefthook run pre-commit` passed with no matching staged files.

The full-suite red state is outside this bead's touched implementation and matches the pre-existing failure noted in the landed bead commit.
